headline: Prologis' Q1 FFO & Revenues Beat Estimates on Strong Leasing Execution
summary: PLD beats Q1 estimates as strong leasing drives higher FFO, revenue growth, and improved outlook.

headline: 3 Best Vanguard Dividend ETFs for Reliable Passive Income in 2026
summary: Dividend investing is a simple way to earn steady income, especially in volatile markets. Many investors prefer stable dividend-paying companies, and Vanguard ETFs offer a low-cost way to get that income with lower risk. Using TipRanks’ Best Vanguard ETFs tool, we identified three income-focused options: Vanguard International High Dividend Yield ETF (VYMI), Vanguard Real Estate ETF (VNQ), and Vanguard Energy ETF (VDE). What makes these ETFs more reliable than some high-yield options is quality
